_comment: PoE Breach domain reference. 5 deities, each with a distinct element, keystone, blessing, and unique items.
breachstone_note: Collect 100 Splinters to form a Breachstone. Higher tiers award more and better items. Flawless is the rarest and most rewarding.

breaches.keystone_effect: Your hits cannot Leech Life from Enemies. Gain 1% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage per 2% Missing Enemy Life.
breaches.blessing_effect: Upgrades Xoph's Heart amulet: grants Avatar of Fire and causes Nearby Enemies to have -10% Fire Resistance.
notable_uniques: Xoph's Blood (Amber Amulet) — Avatar of Fire + Fire Damage near enemies
Xoph's Nurture (Crude Bow) — % Fire Damage, Ignite Proliferation
Xoph's Inception (Breach Ring) — Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
breaches.notes: Xoph's Blood is a top-tier build-enabler for Avatar of Fire builds. Blessing is highly sought after.

breaches.keystone_effect: Cold Skills Echo — they repeat once for 50% less Damage. Cannot Leech Mana from Enemies.
breaches.blessing_effect: Upgrades Tul's Own Hand gloves: grants Hypothermia and a Frostbite aura effect on nearby enemies.
notable_uniques: Tul's Own Hand (Titan Gauntlets) — Cold Damage and Freeze bonuses
Tul's Reach (Shadow Bow) — Cold Damage, Chilling projectiles
Tul's Caress (Breach Ring) — Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
breaches.notes: Echo keystone doubles hit count, which can double on-hit effects (poison, bleed, frenzy charge gain). Great for cold hit builds.

breaches.keystone_effect: Spells have a 10% chance to be reflected back at the Caster. 30% reduced effect of Shock on you.
breaches.blessing_effect: Upgrades Esh's Visage shield: grants immunity to Shock; Nearby Enemies have 50% increased Shock effect taken.
notable_uniques: Esh's Visage (Titanium Spirit Shield) — Spell block, ES, Shock immunity when blessed
Esh's Tear (Breach Ring) — Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks
Esh's Bequest (Jewel) — Gain power charges on kill
breaches.notes: Esh's Visage blessed is excellent for Shock-focused builds or as a defensive shield. One of the more accessible breach blessings.

breaches.keystone_effect: Cannot be Stunned. You have Bone Armour that absorbs damage. Bone Armour regenerates over time.
breaches.blessing_effect: Upgrades Uul-Netol's Kiss: Bone Armour from Enemies slain by Skeleton minions; minion bonuses.
notable_uniques: Uul-Netol's Kiss (Karui Chopper) — % chance to Cause Bleed, Physical Damage
Uul-Netol's Embrace (Carnal Armour) — Summon Skeletons on kill, minion bonuses
Uul-Netol's Fleshcrusher (Breach Ring) — Physical Damage to Attacks
breaches.notes: Physical breach domain. Uul-Netol's Embrace is popular for Skeleton Mage builds. Splinters are slower to collect due to rarity.

breaches.keystone_effect: Chaos Resistance can be Overcapped. Each 1% Overcapped Chaos Resistance grants 1% Damage Reduction.
breaches.blessing_effect: Upgrades Chayula's Will: Chaos Damage Leeched as Life; Blink on Critical Strike.
notable_uniques: Chayula's Will (Silken Hood) — Chaos Resistance, no Chaos Resistance penalty
Chayula's Presence (Onyx Amulet) — +% Chaos Resistance, stun immunity
Chayula's Flicker (Slink Boots) — Chaos Damage, Blink when blessed
breaches.notes: Chayula Breachstone is the hardest domain and the most valuable. Chayula's Presence is sought for chaos-immune builds. Requires a strong build to run.
